abilities.name: Imprison
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Gardevoir ex is your Active Pokemon, you may put an Imprison marker on 1 of your opponent's Pokemon.

attacks.name: Flame Ball
attacks.text: You may move a Fire Energy card attached to Gardevoir ex to 1 of your Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Psychic Storm
attacks.text: Discard all Psychic Energy attached to Gardevoir ex.

tests.name: imprison_blocks_powers
tests.description: Test Imprison marker blocks Poke-Powers and Poke-Bodies
